message.content:
You are verifying that a completed Marketify story matches its PRD acceptance criteria. The Marketify project is at /Users/bulutyazgan/Desktop/marketify.

Story to verify: US-031 (Role-based router — creator vs lister tabs). Read the full story spec from /tmp/story_US-031.json.

Your job:
1. Read /tmp/story_US-031.json
2. Read the routing implementation: app/_layout.tsx, app/index.tsx, app/(auth)/_layout.tsx, app/(creator)/_layout.tsx, app/(lister)/_layout.tsx, src/lib/auth.tsx
3. For each acceptanceCriteria item, verify the implementation actually delivers it.
4. Verify role-based redirects work (signed-out → /(auth), creator → /(creator), lister → /(lister))
5. Verify tab bars per role match spec (creator has Discover/Applied/Submitted/Profile; lister has Home/Inbox/Profile per spec)
6. **IMPORTANT BUG TO INVESTIGATE**: After tapping "Dev sign in as creator" in the role picker (app/(auth)/index.tsx:144-184), the user lands on "Unmatched Route" page at exp://127.0.0.1:8081/--/. Trace why. The dev signin uses fake UUIDs/tokens and calls signIn from useAuth.

Report format (under 350 words):
- For each AC line: PASS / FAIL / PARTIAL with one-line evidence (file:line)
- Diagnosis of the Unmatched Route bug (root cause + suggested fix)
- Verdict: APPROVE / NEEDS WORK

Be terse. Cite file:line for every claim.

content.text: I'll read the story spec and all relevant files simultaneously.

content.content:
1	{
2	  "id": "US-031",
3	  "title": "Role-based router (creator vs lister tabs)",
4	  "description": "Expo-router stack with role-aware tab layouts per docs/design.md \u00a76.",
5	  "acceptanceCriteria": [
6	    "app/_layout.tsx wraps with AuthProvider + ToastProvider + GestureHandlerRootView",
7	    "Unauthed users see (auth) group; creators see (creator) tab group with Discover/Applied/Submitted/Profile; listers see (lister) tab group with Home/Campaigns/Inbox/Profile + a FAB hook",
8	    "All tab labels + lucide icons per docs/design.md",
9	    "Mobile-mcp verification: launch unauthed \u2192 see auth screen; manually call signIn() with a creator token via dev menu \u2192 tabs switch; same for lister",
10	    "Commit"
11	  ],
12	  "priority": 31,
13	  "passes": true,
14	  "notes": "Root _layout already provided AuthProvider+ToastProvider+GestureHandlerRootView from US-030. Added role-aware redirect at app/index.tsx (creator\u2192/(creator)/feed, lister\u2192/(lister)/dashboard, anon\u2192/(auth)). Creator routes per design \u00a73.1 = /feed /applications /submissions /profile (label 'Discover' still shows on the Feed tab/header per spec); Lister routes per \u00a73.2 = /dashboard /campaigns /inbox /profile with FAB mirrored on Dashboard + Campaigns. Custom TabBar primitive (src/components/shared/TabBar.tsx) renders on top of <Slot /> \u2014 expo-router's native <Tabs> crashes under Expo Go + SDK 54 new-arch with 'expected dynamic type boolean'. TabDef splits `path` (for router.navigate) from `activePathname` (URL-stripped for usePathname match) because route-group parens are invisible in the URL. Dev role picker in (auth)/index.tsx lives inside a `__DEV__`-branched sub-component so Metro can strip the fake tokens + UUIDs \u2014 module-level const would survive dead-code removal. Spec gap: Toast primitive doesn't fire at runtime (verified regression exists on /(dev)/primitives toast test buttons too, predates US-031 \u2014 no Toast.tsx changes since US-028 where it worked). Not blocking US-031 AC but needs separate story. Screenshots: scripts/ralph/screenshots/us-031-{auth,creator-feed,creator-discover,creator-profile,lister-home,lister-campaigns-fab,lister-fab-toast}.png."
15	}

1	import { Redirect, Slot } from 'expo-router';
2	import { Compass, Send, User, Video } from 'lucide-react-native';
3	import { StyleSheet, View } from 'react-native';
4	import { TabBar, type TabDef } from '@/components/shared/TabBar';
5	import { colors } from '@/design/tokens';
6	import { useAuth } from '@/lib/auth';
7	
8	// Creator tab group — 4 tabs per US-031 AC + docs/design.md §3.1
9	// (Discover / Applied / Submitted / Profile). We render `<Slot />` with a
10	// custom `<TabBar />` rather than expo-router's native `<Tabs>` because the
11	// latter crashes under Expo Go + SDK 54 new-arch (Codebase Pattern: Stack +
12	// Tabs throw "expected dynamic type 'boolean'"). A dev-client build would let
13	// us swap back to `<Tabs>` without changing any screens.
14	const CREATOR_TABS: TabDef[] = [
15	  {
16	    label: 'Discover',
17	    icon: Compass,
18	    path: '/(creator)/feed',
19	    activePathname: '/feed',
20	    testID: 'tab-feed',
21	  },
22	  {
23	    label: 'Applied',
24	    icon: Send,
25	    path: '/(creator)/applications',
26	    activePathname: '/applications',
27	    testID: 'tab-applications',
28	  },
29	  {
30	    label: 'Submitted',
31	    icon: Video,
32	    path: '/(creator)/submissions',
33	    activePathname: '/submissions',
34	    testID: 'tab-submissions',
35	  },
36	  {
37	    label: 'Profile',
38	    icon: User,
39	    path: '/(creator)/profile',
40	    activePathname: '/profile',
41	    testID: 'tab-profile',
42	  },
43	];
44	
45	export default function CreatorLayout() {
46	  const { role } = useAuth();
47	  if (role !== 'creator') return <Redirect href="/(auth)" />;
48	
49	  return (
50	    <View style={styles.root}>
51	      <View style={styles.content}>
52	        <Slot />
53	      </View>
54	      <TabBar tabs={CREATOR_TABS} />
55	    </View>
56	  );
57	}
58	
59	const styles = StyleSheet.create({
60	  root: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: colors.canvas },
61	  content: { flex: 1 },
62	});
63

1	import { Redirect, Slot } from 'expo-router';
2	import { Building2, Inbox, LayoutDashboard, Megaphone } from 'lucide-react-native';
3	import { StyleSheet, View } from 'react-native';
4	import { TabBar, type TabDef } from '@/components/shared/TabBar';
5	import { colors } from '@/design/tokens';
6	import { useAuth } from '@/lib/auth';
7	
8	// Lister tab group — Home (index) / Campaigns / Inbox / Profile per US-031 AC
9	// + docs/design.md §3.2. Same custom-TabBar rationale as the creator layout:
10	// expo-router's native `<Tabs>` crashes in Expo Go + SDK 54 new-arch. The FAB
11	// is mounted on the Home screen per §3.2 ("Create-campaign is a FAB on
12	// Dashboard + Campaigns tabs — not a center-tab bump").
13	const LISTER_TABS: TabDef[] = [
14	  {
15	    label: 'Home',
16	    icon: LayoutDashboard,
17	    path: '/(lister)/dashboard',
18	    activePathname: '/dashboard',
19	    testID: 'tab-dashboard',
20	  },
21	  {
22	    label: 'Campaigns',
23	    icon: Megaphone,
24	    path: '/(lister)/campaigns',
25	    activePathname: '/campaigns',
26	    testID: 'tab-campaigns',
27	  },
28	  {
29	    label: 'Inbox',
30	    icon: Inbox,
31	    path: '/(lister)/inbox',
32	    activePathname: '/inbox',
33	    testID: 'tab-inbox',
34	  },
35	  {
36	    label: 'Profile',
37	    icon: Building2,
38	    path: '/(lister)/profile',
39	    activePathname: '/profile',
40	    testID: 'tab-profile',
41	  },
42	];
43	
44	export default function ListerLayout() {
45	  const { role } = useAuth();
46	  if (role !== 'lister') return <Redirect href="/(auth)" />;
47	
48	  return (
49	    <View style={styles.root}>
50	      <View style={styles.content}>
51	        <Slot />
52	      </View>
53	      <TabBar tabs={LISTER_TABS} />
54	    </View>
55	  );
56	}
57	
58	const styles = StyleSheet.create({
59	  root: { flex: 1, backgroundColor: colors.canvas },
60	  content: { flex: 1 },
61	});
62

content.text: Now let me read the auth index (dev role picker) to trace the Unmatched Route bug.

I have all the information needed. Here is my review.

---

**Reviewing: US-031 Role-based router (creator vs lister tabs)**

Files reviewed: `app/_layout.tsx`, `app/index.tsx`, `app/(auth)/_layout.tsx`, `app/(creator)/_layout.tsx`, `app/(lister)/_layout.tsx`, `src/lib/auth.tsx`, `app/(auth)/index.tsx`.

---

## Acceptance Criteria

**AC1: `app/_layout.tsx` wraps with AuthProvider + ToastProvider + GestureHandlerRootView**
PASS — `app/_layout.tsx`:31-33 wraps in the exact order: GestureHandlerRootView > AuthProvider > ToastProvider > Slot.

**AC2: Unauthed → (auth); creators → (creator) Discover/Applied/Submitted/Profile; listers → (lister) Home/Campaigns/Inbox/Profile + FAB hook**
PARTIAL — Routing is correct. Creator tabs match spec exactly (`app/(creator)/_layout.tsx`:14-43). Lister tabs have Home/Campaigns/Inbox/Profile matching spec (`app/(lister)/_layout.tsx`:13-42). FAB is noted as mounted on the dashboard screen per the story notes, not in the layout itself — acceptable per design.md §3.2 wording. However: AC2 says listers get "Home/Campaigns/Inbox/Profile" which matches the implementation, but the story spec also says "Inbox" whereas lister layout uses `Inbox` icon correctly at line 29. No mismatch there.

**AC3: All tab labels + lucide icons per docs/design.md**
PASS — Creator: Compass/Discover, Send/Applied, Video/Submitted, User/Profile (`app/(creator)/_layout.tsx`:2,14-43). Lister: LayoutDashboard/Home, Megaphone/Campaigns, Inbox/Inbox, Building2/Profile (`app/(lister)/_layout.tsx`:2,13-42).

**AC4: Mobile-mcp verification: launch unauthed → auth screen; dev signIn → tabs switch**
FAIL (see bug below).

**AC5: Commit**
PASS — commits exist per git log.

---

## Unmatched Route Bug — Root Cause

When "Dev sign in as creator" is tapped, `signIn('dev-creator-token', creatorUser)` is called (`app/(auth)/index.tsx`:171). This calls `setUser(nextUser)` synchronously in `src/lib/auth.tsx`:76-82, which causes `role` to immediately become `'creator'`.

The `(auth)/_layout.tsx` AuthLayout is still mounted at this moment. It re-renders, sees `role === 'creator'`, and issues `<Redirect href="/(creator)/discover" />` at `app/(auth)/_layout.tsx`:11.

The bug is that `/(creator)/discover` **does not exist as a route**. The creator layout's first tab navigates to `/(creator)/feed` (path `'/(creator)/feed'`, `app/(creator)/_layout.tsx`:18), and `app/index.tsx`:10 also redirects to `/(creator)/feed`. There is no `/(creator)/discover` screen file. Expo Router cannot match `/(creator)/discover`, so it renders the "Unmatched Route" screen at `exp://127.0.0.1:8081/--/`.

**Fix:** Change `app/(auth)/_layout.tsx`:11 from:
```
if (role === 'creator') return <Redirect href="/(creator)/discover" />;
```
to:
```
if (role === 'creator') return <Redirect href="/(creator)/feed" />;
```

This aligns with `app/index.tsx`:10 and the actual file structure under `/(creator)/`.

---

## Verdict: NEEDS WORK

The "Unmatched Route" crash on dev creator sign-in is a confirmed bug caused by a stale route string `/(creator)/discover` in `/Users/bulutyazgan/Desktop/marketify/app/(auth)/_layout.tsx`:11 — the correct route is `/(creator)/feed`. One-line fix. All other ACs pass structurally.
